pattern: A running prefix total and the overall total together give the suffix total for free at every position, so both sides of the difference fall out of a single left-to-right pass.
hints: You do not need to recompute a sum from scratch at every position -- keep a running total of everything to the left as you scan.
Once you know the overall sum of the array and the running left total at a position, the right-side total is just overall minus left minus the current element.
Walk the array once, updating the left running total only after using it for the current index, and record the absolute difference at each step.

edge_inputs.description: all elements at the maximum allowed value
all elements at the minimum allowed value
a large outlier at the very start
a large outlier at the very end

stress.description: uniformly random arrays up to the maximum length
